subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One counselleth His loved ones to patience and steadfastness, and to tranquility and dignity. We have indeed entrusted all affairs unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوصی المظلوم احبائه بالصبر و الاصطبار و بالسکون و الوقار انا فوضنا الامور الی
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
